mapper.select: select id, scenic_name, city, category, description, price, score, popularity, tags, longitude, latitude from scenic_spot
mapper.insert: insert into scenic_spot (scenic_name, city, category, description, price, score, popularity, tags, longitude, latitude) values (#{scenicName}, #{city}, #{category}, #{description}, #{price}, #{score}, #{popularity}, #{tags}, #{longitude}, #{latitude})
mapper.update: update scenic_spot set scenic_name = #{scenicName}, city = #{city}, category = #{category}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, score = #{score}, popularity = #{popularity}, tags = #{tags}, longitude = #{longitude}, latitude = #{latitude} where id = #{id}
